news.headline: The Duchess and Her Magical Kingdom series to debut on Prime Video on Feb. 15, 2025, for Prime members in the US at no extra cost.
news.summary: In Alnwick, England, starting February 15, 2025, US audiences can enjoy the exclusive release of "The Duchess and Her Magical Kingdom" on Prime Video at no extra charge for Prime members. This series offers unique insight into the life of The Duchess of Northumberland, with unparalleled access to her world.

news.headline: Man AHL and catastrophe bonds tackle extreme events in credit crunch. Stay informed with Bloomberg.
Survey finds fund managers have lowest cash reserves in 15 years.
Ingram Micro to announce Q4 and Fiscal Year 2024 financial results on March 4, 2025. Conference call at 2:00 pm PT.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, Ingram Micro Holding Corporation (NYSE: INGM) disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fiscal fourth quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, March 4, 2025. The Company has scheduled a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific time (5:00 p.m. Eastern time) on the same day to deliberate on the outcomes. Preceding the conference call, a press release detailing the financial results will be disseminated after the market closes on March 4. Additionally, a live webcast will be available for accessing the conference discussion.

news.headline: SiC fiber market projected to grow at 11.4% CAGR, reaching US$ 2,129.3 million by 2035 with US$ 723.4 million in 2025. North America holds 54.8% market share, aerospace industry to grow with an opportunity of US$ 591.2 million between 2025-2035.
news.summary: The global SiC Fiber Market is predicted to reach US$ 723.4 million in 2025 and grow at a CAGR of 11.4% until 2035. SiC fibers are silicon-carbon molecules with unique properties like high stress and temperature resistance. They are enhancing industries, driving innovation, and are crucial for composite manufacturing and thermal management systems. The market is expected to hit US$ 2,129.3 million by 2035, with a $1,405.9 million opportunity between 2025-2035. North America is set to hold a 54.8% market share in 2035, with the aerospace industry projected to grow at a CAGR of 11.5%, creating a $591.2 million opportunity. North America and East Asia together are estimated to generate a $1,185.9 million opportunity.

news.headline: Hyster-Yale to release Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results on Feb 25, 2025, followed by webcast.
news.summary: Cleveland-based Hyster-Yale, Inc. (NYSE: HY) is set to disclose its financial performance for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of 2024 on February 25, 2025, after the market closes. Following the announcement, the company will conduct a webcast to discuss the results.

news.headline: PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE:PRT) declares monthly cash distribution to record holders of Trust Units as of February 28, 2025, payable on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: In Dallas on February 18, 2025, PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE:PRT) announced a monthly cash distribution for holders of trust units as of February 28, 2025. This distribution will be payable on March 14, 2025. The Trust has declared this payment for those holding beneficial interests in the Trust Units.

news.headline: Thesis Gold reports expansion of mineralization in 2024 Ranch drill program at Lawyers-Ranch Project.
news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC - On February 18, 2025, Thesis Gold Inc. declared the latest drill findings from its 2024 initiative at the Ranch section of the Lawyers-Ranch Project, fully owned by the company. Thesis Gold is listed as (TSXV: TAU), (WKN: A3EP87), (OTCQX: THSGF). The project is accessible by road and has drawn attention due to promising results from the recently concluded drilling campaign.

news.headline: Entergy's 2024 financial results exceed guidance, 9th year in top half; Q4 EPS 65 cents, raises 2025 outlooks.
news.summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE: ETR) announced their fourth quarter 2024 earnings, revealing earnings per share of 65 cents on an as-reported basis and 66 cents on an adjusted (non-GAAP) basis. This marks the ninth consecutive year where the company has achieved results in the top half of its guidance range. Due to this strong performance, Entergy has decided to raise its outlooks for the upcoming fiscal year.

news.headline: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. will post 2024 Annual Report online on Feb 22, 2025, at 8:00 am EST on www.berkshirehathaway.com.
news.summary: In Omaha, Nebraska, Berkshire Hathaway Inc. will release its 2024 Annual Report to shareholders on Saturday, February 22, 2025, around 8:00 a.m. EST on www.berkshirehathaway.com. Alongside the report, they will also issue an earnings release. The Annual Report will feature Warren Buffett’s yearly letter to shareholders and details about Berkshire’s financial status and performance.

news.headline: Huawei launches HUAWEI Mate XT, world's first Tri-fold Smartphone. Pioneers foldable tech.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on February 18, 2025, Huawei unveiled the worldwide debut of the HUAWEI Mate XT | ULTIMATE DESIGN, marking it as the World's First Commercial Tri-fold Smartphone. This release signifies a new era of foldable technology and showcases Huawei's dedication to innovation in the mobile market.

news.headline: ARBOR Technology highlights industrial solutions at Embedded World 2025 in Nuremberg, displaying cutting-edge products for increased efficiency and productivity.
news.summary: A prominent industrial automation solutions provider based in Nuremberg, Germany, ARBOR Technology, will be attending Embedded World 2025. The event will showcase their latest industrial products aimed at improving efficiency and productivity. ARBOR Technology will demonstrate cutting-edge solutions tailored for enhancing flexibility in industrial settings.

news.headline: US stocks set to open higher amid hopes for peace talks in Ukraine; key focus on Walmart, Alibaba, Baidu earnings. Fed likely to keep interest rates unchanged in March. Nasdaq 100 futures up 0.37%, S&P 500 up 0.29%, Dow Jones up 0.10%, Russell 2000 up 0.15%.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures rose after the Presidents Day holiday weekend, with all four benchmark indices advancing. U.S. and Russian officials met in Riyadh for talks on the Ukraine war. Walmart, Alibaba, Baidu, Carvana, and Rivian will report earnings. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.50%, with a 97.5% chance of the Fed keeping rates unchanged. Tech and Communication Services sectors rose on Friday, while Healthcare, Consumer Staples, and Utilities declined. The S&P 500 gained 1.5%, the Dow 0.6%, and the Nasdaq 2.6% last week. Nasdaq Composite closed at 20,026.77, S&P 500 at 6,114.63, Dow Jones at 44,546.08, and Russell 2000 at 2,279.98. Ryan Detrick noted that seven out of 11 sectors have outperformed the S&P 500 YTD.

news.headline: Huawei unveils new tri-fold smartphone, tablets, and open-ear audio at Malaysian event. Global release brings innovation.
news.summary: In Malaysia's capital city, Kuala Lumpur, on February 18, 2025, Huawei Consumer Business Group launched an impressive array of products including audio devices, wearables, tablets, and foldable gadgets at the HUAWEI Innovative Product Launch. The event showcased the release of the latest HUAWEI lineup, featuring cutting-edge technology and innovative designs.

news.headline: UBS and Goldman raise gold price forecasts, boosting outlook for precious metal.
Russian Foreign Ministry: NATO must disavow the Bucharest promises of 2008.
Russian Foreign Ministry: NATO membership for Ukraine is unacceptable for Russia.
Russian Foreign Ministry: A simple refusal to accept Ukraine into NATO is not enough for Russia.

Global low carbon chemicals market to reach US$147.2 billion by 2035, growing at 5.8% CAGR. North America holds 29.9% market share in 2025, offering US$19.4 billion opportunity. East Asia has 24.8% share and US$16.6 billion opportunity. Bio-based chemicals to generate US$24.3 billion opportunity by 2035. Research, development, and collaboration key drivers for market growth.
news.summary: The global low carbon chemicals market is predicted to grow significantly from US$83.5 billion in 2025 to US$147.2 billion in 2035, with a growth rate of 6.8%. This market shift represents a move towards sustainable manufacturing practices in the chemical industry, driven by environmental regulations, corporate responsibility, and consumer demand for eco-friendly products. Key growth areas include bio-based manufacturing, carbon capture usage, and renewable sources in chemical processes. North America and East Asia are major players in this market, with North America expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.9%. Bio-based chemicals are projected to offer a lucrative opportunity of US$24.3 billion between 2025 and 2035. Collaboration between different industry players is also increasing to drive innovation in low carbon chemical solutions.

news.headline: Bitget report shows a dynamic start to 2025, with $1.1 million liquidity pool on Bulbaswap, 20% Gen Z, Alpha interested in crypto pensions.
news.summary: Bitget, a leading cryptocurrency exchange, published its January 2025 Transparency Report showcasing a strong start to the year. The report revealed significant growth in trading volumes and platform engagement. Bitget expanded its BGB ecosystem by launching a BGB liquidity pool on Uniswap and a $1.1 million liquidity pool on Bulbaswap. Bitget Research highlighted that 20% of Gen Z and Gen Alpha respondents are open to including crypto in pension plans. The month also saw the launch of Bitget TraderPro Season 4 with a 10,000 USDT Grand Prize and the introduction of HodlerYield service for earning passive income. Bitget Seed, an AI-powered algorithm, was introduced to identify early-stage Web3 projects, and a strategic integration with Zen facilitated crypto payments. (Word count: 109)

news.headline: Foraco International Q4 2024:- Revenue: $60.8M (Q4 2023: $86.6M)- EBITDA: $10.4M (Q4 2023: $18.7M)- Full-Year 2024 Revenue: $293.5M (2023: $370.1M)- Full-Year 2024 EBITDA: $60.5M (2023: $86.7M)- Net Debt: Reduced to $60.9M from $65.2M in 2023. CEO & CFO comments on strategic moves and financials.
news.summary: Foraco International SA (TSX:FAR) reported its Q4 2024 results, showing a revenue of US$60.8 million compared to US$86.6 million in Q4 2023. EBITDA was US$10.4 million, or US$13.9 million excluding one-off items, down from US$18.7 million in Q4 2023. Full-year highlights included a revenue of US$293.5 million compared to US$370.1 million in 2023, with EBITDA at US$60.5 million or US$66.6 million excluding one-off items (down from US$86.7 million in 2023). Net profit was US$27.8 million compared to US$28.7 million in 2023, and net debt decreased to US$60.9 million. Order backlog for FY 2025 was US$200.6 million. CEO Tim Bremner emphasized the company's resilience, while CFO Fabien Sevestre highlighted operational efficiency.

news.headline: Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. reported strong Q4 results in 2024 - 1,748 new homes delivered, $1.2B sales revenue, net income of $129M. Full-year 2024 showed 6,460 new home deliveries and $458M net income. The company announced a new stock repurchase program and reported total liquidity of $1.7B. Q1 2025 expectations include delivering 900-1,100 homes at an average price of $685,000-$695,000 and full-year 2025 expected to deliver 5,500-6,100 homes at an average price of $660,000-$670,000. The company performed well, with an increase in gross margin percentage year-over-year.
news.summary: Tri Pointe Homes, Inc. reported strong fourth-quarter results for 2024 with 1,748 new home deliveries resulting in $1.2 billion in home sales revenue. Their homebuilding gross margin percentage improved to 23.3%, while Selling, General and Administrative Expense as a Percentage of Home Sales Revenue was 10.3%. Net income available to common stockholders was $129 million, translating to $1.37 diluted earnings per share. The company had a record-high 6,460 new home deliveries for the full year, with a net income available to common stockholders of $458 million, or $4.83 per diluted share, a 40% annual increase. Operational highlights included a decrease in new home deliveries in Q4 by 4% compared to the previous year, along with a 2% increase in the average sales price of homes delivered. The company also repurchased stock and ended the year with total liquidity of $1.7 billion. Tri Pointe Homes anticipates delivering 900-1,100 homes in Q1 2025 and between 5,500 and 6,100 homes for the year, projecting continued success and market growth. The company's stock repurchase program and strong balance sheet indicate a positive outlook for future growth. Total assets for the company were $4.89 billion as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Chatbot Arena announced its arrival before DeepSeek explosion, significant development in tech industry.
Goldman raises gold target to $3,100 on central bank demand, according to Bloomberg report.
PicoCELA Inc. sees 40% revenue growth and 23% decrease in net loss for FY ended Sept. 30, 2024.
news.summary: For the fiscal year ending on February 18, 2025, PicoCELA Inc. reported significant financial growth. The Tokyo-based company saw a remarkable 40% year-over-year increase in revenue. Additionally, there was a notable 23% year-over-year decrease in net loss. PicoCELA Inc., traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol PCLA, specializes in providing enterprise wireless mesh solutions.

news.headline: CFOs upbeat on growth for 2025: 52% foresee profit rise, 21% develop AI, 28% expand workforce skills. 48% worry about op risk.
news.summary: In Chicago, a recent report by BDO USA reveals optimistic projections by CFOs, with 52% expecting an increase in their organization's profitability within the next year. Furthermore, 21% of CFOs state their organizations are developing proprietary generative artificial intelligence (AI) platforms. Notably, 28% of CFOs are enhancing upskilling and reskilling initiatives in their workforce strategies. The report also highlights key concerns identified by CFOs, with operational risk at 48%, tax risk at 45%, and third-party risk at 40%.

news.headline: Monroe Capital helps fund Olympus Partners' acquisition of Accelevation Holding Co, providing senior credit facility.
news.summary: In Chicago, Monroe Capital LLC facilitated the funding of a senior credit facility as one of the joint lead arrangers to aid in the acquisition of Accelevation Holding Company, LLC by Olympus Partners. Accelevation, established in 2018 and located in Miamisburg, OH, specializes in infrastructure products and services for the data center sector. Their comprehensive services encompass white space design, tailored manufacturing, and installation services. The company is known for providing a vertically integrated range of solutions.

news.headline: Nanoco Group PLC to attend industry conferences to ramp up commercial engagement and showcase technology. Leader in cadmium-free quantum dots. Founder to speak in March.
news.summary: Nanoco Group PLC, a global leader in cadmium-free quantum dots and advanced nanomaterials, is increasing its commercial efforts as it moves towards scaled production. The company, listed on the London Stock Exchange (LSE: NANO), will participate in multiple industry events in the upcoming months to exhibit its technology, engage with customers and partners, and drive the uptake of its solutions. In March, Nanoco's Founder and CTO will lead these initiatives to propel the company's growth.

news.headline: Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) reported Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results, with a record year highlighted by strong execution and margin expansion. President and CEO John H. Stone praised the team's efforts.
news.summary: Allegion plc, a prominent global provider of security products and solutions, disclosed their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2024, ending on December 31st. The President and CEO, John H. Stone, expressed satisfaction with achieving a record-breaking year characterized by steady performance, significant margin growth, and strategic capital allocation. Stone attributed this success to the dedicated expertise of their team and collaborative efforts with distribution channels. Allegion plc is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALLE.

news.headline: Atkore Inc. sells Northwest Polymers Recycling Business in Oregon, focusing on core operations. CEO cites strategic review.
news.summary: Atkore Inc. (NYSE: ATKR), a prominent electrical products manufacturer, recently disclosed the sale of Northwest Polymers, a plastic recycler in Oregon. The company caters to various sectors like commercial, industrial, data center, telecommunications, and solar applications. Northwest Polymers, situated in Molalla and Aurora, specializes in post-industrial and post-commercial plastic recycling. Atkore's President and CEO, Bill Waltz, elucidated the move, stating that the company regularly evaluates its strategic business aspects, including potential acquisitions.

news.headline: Lime reports record revenue and profit in 2024: Gross bookings $810 million, net revenue $686 million - 31-32% increase.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Lime, the leading shared electric vehicle company, shared its unaudited financial results for 2024. The company reported a record year with impressive numbers: $810 million in gross bookings, indicating a 31% increase from 2023, and $686 million in net revenue, marking a 32% growth. Lime's success demonstrates its commitment to creating a future with shared, affordable, and environmentally friendly transportation options.

news.headline: GreenCore Solutions Corp. launches FemCare UltraThin, expanding tree-free hygiene products; aims to expand private label offerings.
news.summary: GreenCore Solutions Corp. (GreenCore), a prominent global provider of tree-free hygiene products, has unveiled their latest offering, FemCare UltraThin. The company announced the expansion of their retail private label options, marking a significant step in their operations. The launch was made official on Feb. 18, 2025, with the aim of meeting the growing demand for eco-friendly feminine care products. This move further reinforces GreenCore's position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: General Mills celebrates five years of success at CAGNY 2025, showcasing financial growth and shareholder returns. CEO Harmening and CFO Bruce to discuss Accelerate strategy.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, during the Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) 2025 Conference, General Mills, Inc. Chairman and CEO Jeff Harmening and CFO Kofi Bruce will discuss the company’s Accelerate strategy. This strategy, aimed at achieving long-term sustainable growth and top-tier shareholder returns, has shown positive results. General Mills, Inc. (NYSE: GIS) has reported strong financial progress over the past five years, signaling success in their strategic decisions. The company's leadership will present their achievements and future plans regarding the Accelerate strategy at the event.

news.headline: mF International Limited launches upgraded Trader Pro mobile app for brokers with advanced customization features.
news.summary: mF International Limited (Nasdaq: MFI) has recently announced the launch of Trader Pro, a newly upgraded platform offering enhanced customization options for brokers. This launch signifies a significant development for the company, as Trader Pro seamlessly integrates with its existing trading systems. The platform brings a new level of versatility and efficiency for brokers, empowering them to tailor their trading experience according to their unique preferences. This upgrade showcases mF International's commitment to providing innovative solutions to its clients in the financial industry. The announcement was made on February 18, 2025, from Hong Kong.

news.headline: Four Hands partners with Slip Robotics to boost warehouse efficiency, achieving 4x throughput, 75% less trailer unload time, and 50% faster loading with 50% fewer product touches.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Four Hands, a prominent global designer and wholesaler of lifestyle home furnishings, has collaborated with Slip Robotics to enhance warehouse operations efficiency. By implementing SlipBots in various facilities, the company achieved remarkable results including a fourfold boost in throughput, a 75% decrease in trailer unload time, a 50% reduction in loading time, and slashing product touches by 50%. Four Hands' impressive growth in recent times has landed them a spot on the prestigious Inc. 5000 List of Fastest Growing Companies.

news.headline: RBI acquires partners' equity stakes to drive long-term growth in China with Burger King. Toronto, Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: Restaurant Brands International Inc. (NYSE: QSR) (TSX: QSR) (TSX: QSP), also known as RBI, has recently acquired the equity stakes of its partners in China. This move signifies RBI's dedication to strengthening its presence in China and fostering long-term growth in the region. As a result of this transaction, the company will now be searching for a new local operating partner. The announcement was made in Toronto on February 18, 2025, showcasing RBI's strategic initiatives in the Chinese market.

news.headline: i-80 Gold's Archimedes Underground Project in Nevada shows NPV(5%) of $127M and IRR of 23% at $2,175/oz Au.
news.summary: This announcement serves as an official news release as per the Company's prospectus supplement dated August 12, 2024, related to its short form base shelf prospectus from June 21, 2024. RENO, Nevada, Feb. 18, 2025 - i-80 GOLD CORP. is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol IAU and on the New York Stock Exchange as IAUX.

news.headline: Pratt & Whitney, an RTX company, adds Sanad Group to GTF MRO Network in UAE, becoming the first shop in South Asia, Middle East, and North Africa. (Characters: 133)
news.summary: A facility in the UAE is set to make history by becoming the inaugural GTF MRO network shop in the South Asia, Middle East, and North Africa region. Pratt & Whitney, a business under RTX (NYSE: RTX), revealed on February 18, 2025, that it is taking steps to broaden its international network for GTF engine maintenance services.

news.headline: Global Omega-3 Day on March 3 advocates for EPA and DHA omega-3s, vital for health, with only 10% reaping benefits.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Utah on February 18, 2025, it has been reported that many individuals may not be consuming adequate amounts of essential 'good fats' necessary for maintaining good health. EPA and DHA omega-3s, crucial nutrients present in fatty fish and marine microalgae, play a vital role in the health of every cell in the body. Shockingly, research suggests that a significant 90% of the population may be deficient in these essential fatty acids.

news.headline: Renting remains more affordable than buying in almost all major U.S. metros, with average rent at $1,703 decreasing by 0.2% yearly.
news.summary: The average U.S. median asking rents have dropped slightly by 0.2% year over year to reach $1,703. This new data was reported from Austin, Texas on February 18, 2025. Many metropolitan areas have seen an improvement in affordability for both buyers and renters over the past year. Despite this improvement, renting a median-priced unit remains the more budget-friendly option for most individuals.

news.headline: Stellus Capital Management provides unitranche financing for ICV Partners' investment in Environmental Remedies, LLC in 2025.
news.summary: In Houston, Texas on February 18, 2025, Stellus Capital Management, LLC revealed that its affiliates offered senior debt financing and equity co-investment to back ICV Partners' investment in Environmental Remedies, LLC (ERI). No specific numbers provided.

news.headline: MacKenzie Scott's large, unrestricted donations have created sustained impact for nonprofits, shows report by CEP.
news.summary: In a report unveiled on February 18, 2025, in Cambridge, Massachusetts, The Center for Effective Philanthropy (CEP) revealed that MacKenzie Scott's substantial unrestricted donations have contributed to boosting the financial stability of nonprofits. These gifts mark a shift from traditional philanthropic practices, as highlighted by the report. The specific figures and details regarding the impact of Scott's donations on the nonprofits' finances were not disclosed in the information provided.

news.headline: Consumers Energy clearing 8,000+ miles of trees by power lines in Michigan to enhance grid reliability; $15K per mile cleared.
news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan on February 18, 2025, Consumers Energy announced plans to enhance the state's electric grid by removing trees and limbs from over 8,000 miles of power lines in the current year. This marks an increase of 1,000 miles from the previous year. The cost to clear each mile of power line is estimated at $15,000.

news.headline: IsoEnergy and Future Fuels finalize transaction for Mountain Lake property in Nunavut. (Characters: 78)
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on February 18, 2025, IsoEnergy Ltd. (TSX: ISO) (OTCQX: ISENF) and Future Fuels Inc. (TSXV: FTUR) (FSE: S0J) have successfully finalized their transaction. The two companies, collectively known as the "Companies," have wrapped up the deal as per the prior announcement.

news.headline: Rupert Resources finishes Pre-Feasibility Study for Ikkari, showing NPV of $1.7B and IRR of 38%. Located in Northern Finland. NI 43-101 report available.
news.summary: In Toronto, Rupert Resources Ltd has finalized a Pre-feasibility study for its Ikkari Project in Northern Finland. The project, situated 40km from Sodankylä, is fully owned by the company. The report is in compliance with the National Instrument 43-101 Standards of Disclosure for Mineral Projects and can be accessed on the company's website. For more information, the report is also available on SEDAR+.

news.headline: CTC Global appoints John Emery as new VP, North America Sales and Business Development to lead growth strategy.
news.summary: A manufacturer of advanced conductors in Irvine, California, CTC Global has announced the appointment of John Emery as the Vice President of North America Sales and Business Development. In his new role, Emery will spearhead the company's expansion efforts across North America, with a primary focus on increasing market share and enhancing partnerships within the utility, industrial, and commercial sectors. With more than twenty years of experience in the industry, Emery is set to play a pivotal role in driving growth and fostering key relationships for CTC Global in the region.

news.headline: Rhythmos.io collaboration with E3 shows grid-edge EV charging could cut transformer upgrade costs by up to 60%.
news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado, Rhythmos.io has partnered with Energy and Environmental Economics (E3) to evaluate the effects of optimized managed electric vehicle (EV) charging on grid stability due to increasing electricity demands. Through a study documented in a white paper by E3, it was found that optimized EV charging could potentially decrease distribution transformer upgrade expenses by approximately [specific number not given]. This collaboration aims to address the challenges of rising electricity consumption and enhance grid reliability.

news.headline: Chemours Company announces Q4 and full-year 2024 results from Wilmington, Del., marking significant financial performance.
news.summary: Chemours Company, based in Wilmington, Delaware, recently announced their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company reported a total revenue of $CC for the mentioned period. The details of the financial performance and any other pertinent information were not disclosed.

news.headline: ECB's Holzmann: March rate decision to depend on data.
ECB's Holzmann: Services and core inflation are concerns.
